calendar.matters:
Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Millar for and with Kevin Simmonite.

The Court stated that it is looking for evidence of actions taken on behalf of the Trustor to show that a trust was created on this property. Mr. Millar stated that they have the Trust, the amendment and the pourover will, spoke of the pourover provisions regarding after determined assets and the assets the Trustor inherited from her Husband. The Petition for Order that Asset Constitutes a Trust Asset is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Order That Asset Constitutes A Trust Asset
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To Jun-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
